creator: damjan.jov@gmail.com
text: Please scrap that patch, it's fixed upstream now in SVN revision 1724971 (github https://github.com/apache/openoffice/commit/1b37335955a5c2a31c90142ea739bee1bd54a79c). If you want to fix older openoffice versions, backport that patch instead, which will fix encryption functions and digital signatures too, not just cryptographic hash functions.
